top_signals.title: Saudi Crude Flow From Red Sea Hit Record Before Houthi Warning
top_signals.summary: Saudi Arabia exported record volumes of crude oil from terminals on the Red Sea in the days and weeks before the Houthis said they would block the nation’s shipments.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India Summons Russian Diplomat After Four Indian Seafarers Perish
top_signals.summary: India said it had summoned a senior Russian diplomat on Tuesday and expressed "grave concerns" after a missile strike killed four Indians on a Black Sea cargo ship that was leaving a Ukrainian port.Ukraine said Russia hit the Golden Leo – a…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Biotech IPOs Outperform AI Listings, Leading US Market in 2026
top_signals.summary: The biotechnology sector is stealing the US IPO market thunder from artificial intelligence-related listings, delivering standout returns as bankers line up a steady stream of summer debuts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Tether-backed Twenty One, Strike merger plan scrapped: Bloomberg
top_signals.summary: Strike will remain a standalone company after the proposed three-way merger was scrapped, while Twenty One Capital and Elektron continue discussions, Bloomberg reported.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
